zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath於1419年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾素斯 福拉薩爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Longe28歲，母親Lady Margaret Godfrey25歲。他和Margaret Wayte至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他於1442年被列為member of parliment for cricklade。他去世於1478年9月20日在英國維爾爾德雷可特 福利亞特享年59歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾德雷可特 爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath于1419年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾素斯 福拉薩爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Longe28岁，母亲Lady Margaret Godfrey25岁。他和Margaret Wayte至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他于1442年被列为member of parliment for cricklade。他去世于1478年9月20日在英国維爾爾德雷可特 福利亞特享年59岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾德雷可特 爾。

nameMeanings.name: Longe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the feminine form of   Long   ‘long, tall’.
French (Longé): derivative of Old French longe ‘(leather) thong’, used in a transferred sense as a topographic name for someone who lived on a long, narrow stretch of terrain.

variants.name: Lange
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Horst, Otto, Wolfgang, Ernst, Helmut, Hermann, Manfred, Reinhold.
German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: variant of   Lang   ‘long’. This surname is also found in Poland and in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   De Lange  .
French: variant, with fused definite article l', of Ange 2. Compare Longe 1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath was born in 1419, in South Wraxall, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Longe, was 28 and his mother, Lady Margaret Godfrey, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Wayte. In 1442, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as member of parliment for cricklade. He died on 20 September 1478, in Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath est né en 1419, à South Wraxall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Longe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Godfrey, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Wayte. En 1442, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliment for cricklade. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1478, à Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath 1419 in South Wraxall, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Longe 28 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Godfrey 25. Er hatte mit Margaret Wayte mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1442, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliment for cricklade aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. September 1478 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath è nato il nel 1419 nel South Wraxall, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Longe, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Godfrey, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Wayte. Nel 1442, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliment for cricklade. Morì il 20 settembre 1478, nel Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bathが1419年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアソウス ウラクサルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Longeは28歳，母Lady Margaret Godfreyは25歳であった。彼はMargaret Wayteとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1442年，23歳の時，職業はmember of parliment for crickladeと記録されている。彼は1478年9月20日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアドレイコト フォリアトで59歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアドレイコト セルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath(이)가 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 소우스 라스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Longe(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Godfrey(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margaret Wayte(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1442년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliment for cricklade이었다. 그는 1478년 9월 20일 영국 윌츠히르 드라이컷 폴리앳에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 드라이컷 세른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath nasceu em 1419, em South Wraxall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Longe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Godfrey, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Wayte. Em 1442, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliment for cricklade. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1478, em Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Longe of Draycot-Cerne, Knight of the Bath родился в 1419 г. в местности соут раксалл, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Longe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Godfrey, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margaret Wayte. В 1442 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliment for cricklade. Он умер 20 сентября 1478 г. в местности дреикот фолят, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности дреикот кирн, уилцхир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Wayte. En 1442, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliment for cricklade. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1478, en Draycot Foliat, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Draycot Cerne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
